response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical expertise and leadership in developer tooling, testing infrastructure, and full-stack development, with experience at top-tier tech companies like Google and Meta. However, his people-management experience is less explicitly detailed, and his background leans more toward hands-on technical leadership than formal team management.
strengths: Extensive experience in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and build systems (e.g., MCP code generators at Google, CI/CD at Altom Consulting).
Proven technical leadership with contributions to open-source projects and workshops/talks on testing and developer productivity.
Diverse full-stack and mobile-platform experience (e.g., Apple TV/iOS apps, Node.js, TypeScript, DLang) with a focus on scalability and performance.
concerns: Limited explicit evidence of formal people-management experience (e.g., team size, performance reviews, or structured 1:1s).
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in computer science or related field, though equivalent practical experience is present.
Mobile-platform knowledge is present but not a dominant focus in recent roles (e.g., Google/Meta work emphasizes AI and full-stack).
